heroHeadline: First Chadian GSF Troops Arrive; Gran Grif Advances on Artibonite Breadbasket
heroSubtitle: The Gang Suppression Force's first Chadian contingent (~50 troops) landed April 1 alongside Special Representative Jack Christofides, as Gran Grif and Kokorat San Ras gangs continued attacking Artibonite communities days after the Jean-Denis massacre (up to 70 killed, Mar 30); Amnesty International condemned the killings as a 'widespread failure to protect'; full 5,550-person GSF force not expected until October 2026 with Chad pledging 800 total troops
footerNote: Data sourced from UN BINUH, OHCHR, OCHA, IOM, Reuters, AP, Miami Herald, Al Jazeera, France 24, Le Nouvelliste, ACLED, ICG, HRW, WFP, Haitian Times, Jamaica Observer, RNDDH, PassBlue, Amnesty International
